name: Alaska Speech-Language Pathologist License
description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Alaska - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Board of Examiners in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology
provider.parentOrganization: Alaska Department of Commerce, Community, and Economic Development

address.description:
Division of Corporations, Business and Professional Licensing
P.O. Box 110806
Juneau, AK 99811-0806

requiredDocuments.name: Praxis exam score report
requiredDocuments.description: Score of 162 or higher on test 5331.

requiredDocuments.name: Clinical Fellowship verification
requiredDocuments.description: CF supervisor attestation or ASHA CCC-SLP certificate.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does an Alaska SLP license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The application and license fee is $250. Biennial renewal is also $250. Alaska has higher licensing fees compared to most other states.

mainEntity.name: Is Alaska part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Alaska allow telepractice for SLPs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Alaska permits telepractice and it is widely used due to the state's remote geography.

mainEntity.name: Does Alaska have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers speech-language pathologist practice in Alaska. To work in Alaska, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Alaska?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 8 weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Alaska while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
